description: A client needs a new, secure Amazon S3 bucket to store application backups.

nodes.task_description: Create a new S3 bucket in the client's AWS account.
Configure the bucket with private-only access, encryption-at-rest, and versioning enabled.

expected_outcome.value: The bucket is configured with security best practices.

nodes.task_description: Create a new IAM user with programmatic access restricted only to this new S3 bucket.

expected_outcome.value: A secure, least-privilege IAM user is created for the application.
